meta.author: Aakash Borse
meta.description:
Apply AC input from 150–280 VAC (domestic range) at 45–65 Hz at full load (53A/59V).
Verify: Input current <15A rms @ 230VAC; PF >0.99; THD-i <2%; Stable output throughout.
Confirm cut-off at >280±5 VAC and auto-resume at 270±5 VAC.
Condition: Tambient = 25°C, rated output load.
meta.name: 1 AC Operating Voltage Range
